sources.usStocks: SPY adjClose month-end total return (data/tickers/SPY.json, Tiingo) from 2023-07; S&P composite (Shiller) before. ~3bp/yr ETF fee drag vs index.
sources.usBonds: FRED GS10 with the original Shiller-pipeline formula gs10/12 - 7*(gs10Next - gs10) from 2023-07.
sources.cash: FRED GS10 / 12 / 4 proxy (unchanged convention; not TB3MS) from 2023-07.
sources.cpi: FRED CPIAUCNS (CPI-U NSA, matches Shiller levels exactly) from 2023-07.

interpolationNote: Geometric interpolation of neighboring CPIAUCNS levels; 2025-10 CPI was never published by BLS (2025 federal shutdown).
